race.comment: POWER ACE (3) presents third-up for the premier metro stable. Led and looked a run short over 1650m at Beaudesert and should be fit enough for the step up to a middle distance. Has a handy 2kg claim back in grade and will skip over and give a sight. WATERMELON (1) made good improvement, beaten a half-length here on the turf and then came back and didn't get into it this trip in a 65. Maps better today, and the 3kg claim brings him right into it. ALABAMA GIRL (6) defied a lack of market support last start, scoring by a long neck over 1812m at Port Macquarie. Needs a good ride but can be in the finish holding that form. FOREVER FORTUNE (4) races well on the poly and is better suited today. This trip holds no fears, and he can get back on track. PAPAL MISS (9) will be better switching back to a middle distance, and she also appreciates this course/distance.
